title: Social preview card deployed — 1200x630 OG image replaces bare icon.png

social_card.alt_text: Ralph Workflow — Open-source autonomous coding workflow orchestrator

files_changed: app/helpers/application_helper.rb (default og_image_url fallback, JSON-LD article/webpage images)
rationale: Every link shared to Discord, Slack, Twitter, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Telegram now shows a proper 1200x630 project card with name + tagline + Codeberg URL instead of a bare 512x512 app icon. This is a conversion surface improvement — the social card is the first visual impression anyone gets when someone shares a Ralph Workflow link.

social_card_design.background: Dark navy/slate gradient with subtle grid pattern
social_card_design.title: Ralph Workflow (72px bold white)
social_card_design.subtitle_2: Run your agents overnight — wake up to reviewable output
social_card_design.accent: Top blue line, radial glow behind title
